## Execution Sequence Diagram
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    actor Client as External Caller
    participant PublicAPI as LanguageParserInterface
    participant InternalCore as buildClassFromNode

    Client->>PublicAPI: execute LanguageParserInterface()
    activate PublicAPI
    PublicAPI->>InternalCore: validate parameters & prepare context
    activate InternalCore
    InternalCore->>InternalCore: execute internal business logic
    InternalCore-->>PublicAPI: return domain operation result
    deactivate InternalCore
    PublicAPI-->>Client: return public execution response
    deactivate PublicAPI
```
